Kíméletes összetételének köszönhetően idősek számára is alkalmas. items.raw_desc: Teszter Xtrobb Fékfolyadék teszter:Compact size - the tester has a small size, the size resembles a marker. The tool also fits in a handy toolbox that we carry in the car or in our pocket. Precise - the principle of the tester is based on the measurement of the water content in the brake fluid. Simply immerse the electrodes in the liquid. Thanks to the precise measurement with 5 LED indicators, you can be sure to get an accurate measurement of the brake fluid level. 5 LEDs - the tester has LEDs indicating the level of liquid water. Green LED - battery OK, water content <1%, yellow diode - water content from 1% to 2%, two yellow diodes - water content from 2% to 3%, red diode - water content approx. 3%, two red diodes - water content above 3%. Direct measurement - all you have to do is press the button and dip the tester electrodes into the brake fluid reservoir, then read the LEDs.
